description: Jakarta Activation API defines the standard Java contracts for identifying data MIME types, wrapping data sources, discovering available commands, and binding content to handlers. The jakarta.activation-api artifact provides only the API classes for compiling against those contracts, while implementation classes are supplied by an activation implementation.

Jakarta Activation API defines Java interfaces and classes for determining data types, encapsulating access to data, and mapping MIME content to command handlers. This API-only artifact is used to compile applications against the JavaBeans Activation Framework contracts without including the full implementation classes.
